creator: Mark.Martinec@ijs.si
text:
Building a polish/libgadu port with LibreSSL fails, using:

  WITH_OPENSSL_PORT= yes
  OPENSSL_PORT= security/libressl

The full poudriere build log is attached. The build fails with
a linker error, here is the essence of the failure:

    CCLD     conn-async
  ../src/.libs/libgadu.so: undefined reference to `SSLv3_client_method'
  ../src/.libs/libgadu.so: undefined reference to `SSLv3_client_method'
  cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
  cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
  Makefile:402: recipe for target 'status' failed
  gmake[4]: *** [status] Error 1


Seems the libgadu expects support for SSLv3, but the LibreSSL
has recently removed all support for SSLv2 and SSLv3.

As the polish/libgadu port is a dependency of net-im/kopete-kde4,
it is no longer possible to build the Kopete instant messenger.

Btw, I have no idea how the 'libgadu' port ended up in the 'polish'
ports collection, I don't have Polish in my locale, and I'm using
OPTIONS_UNSET=NLS in my make.conf.
